data.body: ed13 FIX COMPLETE: full make test = 6513 passed, only 3 failures — all pre-existing ENVIRONMENTAL config-isolation tests (test_config_show/test_config_perf) that fail at pristine base d9bb3be0 too and pass in CI (c085/0b96 got Verified+1 on same suite); ed13 touches 0 config files.
